examples.text: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَتَوَفَّنَا مُسْلِمِينَ
examples.english: Our Lord! Pour out on us patience, and cause us to die as Muslims!

senses.gloss: elative degree of فَارِغ (fāriḡ), elative degree of فَرِغ (fariḡ):; emptier; emptiest
elative degree of فَارِغ (fāriḡ), elative degree of فَرِغ (fariḡ):; more vacant; most vacant
elative degree of فَارِغ (fāriḡ):; more idle; most idle
elative degree of فَارِغ (fāriḡ):; more meaningless, more inane; most meaningless, most inane

etymology.text: Morphologically from the root ف ر غ (f r ḡ).
